description: Add a required System.Threading.CancellationToken parameter to the CanCloseAsync method declared on the IWorkspace interface.
Remove the GridSearchAdapter.cs source file from the project; it is believed to be unused.
Add an XML documentation comment (///) above the DetectColumnType helper method describing what it returns.
Rename a local variable inside the DetectColumnType method to a clearer name; this is a purely local rename.
